title: Deref<Target=str> removed from Id and UTCDate newtypes
description: The Deref<Target=str> impl was removed from Id and UTCDate. With Deref, code like option_id.as_deref() == Some("foo") compiles fine but mixes the newtype with bare &str in ways that defeat the type boundary. Without Deref, callers must write .as_str() or .as_ref().map(|id| id.as_str()) explicitly, making each conversion visible in code review. The change also prevents accidental implicit coercions in match arms, function args, and comparisons. A contributor might suggest adding Deref back for ergonomics — resist: the explicitness is the point.
close_reason: Decision recorded during idfq epic implementation; design intentionally retained as-is.
